title: Capital Letters & Shift
description: Always use the OPPOSITE Shift key. Right Shift for left-hand letters, left Shift for right-hand letters.

drills.content: Aa Bb Cc Dd Ee Ff Gg Hh Ii Jj Kk Ll Mm
Nn Oo Pp Qq Rr Ss Tt Uu Vv Ww Xx Yy Zz
Alice Bob Charlie Diana Erik Fiona George Hannah
New York Paris London Tokyo Madrid Berlin Rome
